mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_camp c LEFT JOIN t_camp_type ct ON c.type_id = ct.type_id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.start_time > NOW()
AND NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time
AND c.end_time < NOW()
AND c.type_id = #{typeId}

SELECT c.camp_id, c.type_id, ct.level_name AS level_name, c.term, c.name, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, CASE WHEN NOW() < c.start_time THEN 0 WHEN NOW() > c.end_time THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS status, c.tag, c.enroll_count FROM t_camp c LEFT JOIN t_camp_type ct ON c.type_id = ct.type_id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.start_time > NOW()
AND NOW() BETWEEN c.start_time AND c.end_time
AND c.end_time < NOW()
AND c.type_id = #{typeId}
ORDER BY c.start_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT type_id AS typeId, level_name AS levelName FROM t_camp_type ORDER BY type_id
SELECT camp_id AS campId, name, term, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime FROM t_camp ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_camp ( type_id, term, name, intro, start_time, end_time, tag, enroll_count ) VALUES ( #{typeId}, #{term}, #{name}, #{intro}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{tag}, #{enrollCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_camp SET type_id = #{typeId}, term = #{term}, name = #{name}, intro = #{intro}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, tag = #{tag} WHERE camp_id = #{campId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.camp_id AS id, c.tag, ct.level_name AS type, c.term, c.name AS title, CAST(c.enroll_count AS CHAR) AS count, c.start_time FROM t_camp c LEFT JOIN t_camp_type ct ON c.type_id = ct.type_id WHERE c.end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.tag = '热招' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, c.enroll_count DESC, c.start_time DESC LIMIT 5
